narrative:
Seneca County has 33,811 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.3 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.1% of registrants.
